title: Localize recovery truth and refine source failure types
summary: Move remaining recovery and context status copy onto StudioStrings, and replace generic recent-import and remote-fetch failures with more specific recovery-aware error cases.
acceptance_criteria: StudioShellModel no longer hardcodes user-facing recovery readiness or recommendation copy in English.
Recent import resolution, local file read, and remote fetch failures produce more precise recovery-aware issues than a generic raw error path.
Workspace context summaries for tokens, icons, typography, and spatial tokens no longer hardcode English labels.
Ticket validation, patch hygiene, and a HumbleStudioMac debug build pass for the slice.

evidence.note: HS-0012 ticket schema validated after localizing recovery truth copy and refining recent-import and remote-fetch failure cases.
Patch hygiene passed after updating StudioStrings, the string catalog, and recovery-aware source error handling.

evidence.path: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
evidence.note: Native macOS build succeeded after moving remaining recovery copy onto StudioStrings and refining source failure classification.

trigger.source_ref: Top 10 items 1 and 2 merged into one recovery-truth slice after HS-0011.

commands: xcodebuild -project HumbleStudio.xcodeproj -scheme HumbleStudioMac -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
agent_notes: This slice keeps the recent shared native recovery surface but feeds it more truthful copy and slightly better failure classification.
Proposal artifact workflow remains out of scope for this pass.
